description_long: This is a detached single-family house surrounded by a low fence and featuring a front yard with a paved driveway and a small tree. The house has a gable roof with a prominent central section and two side wings, one of which includes a garage with a white door. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick or siding, and the roof is finished in dark shingles. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with a central entry door flanked by windows. The backyard is grassy and contains a large tree, while the side and rear fences enclose the property. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A light-brick, gable-roofed suburban house with a garage, fenced yard, and symmetrical windows. The property features a paved driveway, front and back lawns, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, garage, paved driveway, and a small tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof profile, fenced yard, and grassy backyard with a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, large tree, and the rear facade of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, roofline, and both front and back yards with their respective trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry door with a small overhang, flanked by windows and adjacent to a single-car garage; no porch or steps visible.
